rules.name: BREVITY_DEPTH_TENSION
rules.description: Request contains both brevity and comprehensiveness constraints.
rules.reason: Brevity and comprehensiveness are in tension. The agent should note the tradeoff and choose the interpretation most consistent with the verb and audience.

rules.name: TONE_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for both casual and formal tone.
rules.reason: Casual and formal tones can conflict. The agent should blend carefully or ask which tone matters more when stakes are high.

rules.name: AUDIENCE_TENSION
rules.description: Request names both beginner and advanced audiences.
rules.reason: Beginner and advanced audiences need different assumptions. The agent should pick one primary audience or layer the response.

rules.name: SIMPLICITY_DEPTH_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for simple treatment and detailed depth.
rules.reason: Simplicity and depth pull in different directions. The agent should use simple language while limiting or staging depth.

rules.name: EFFORT_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for fast turnaround and thorough effort.
rules.reason: Fast and thorough imply a tradeoff. The agent should be clear whether it is giving a quick pass or a deeper treatment.

rules.name: STYLE_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for creative style and factual restraint.
rules.reason: Creative expression can conflict with factual precision. The agent should preserve facts and confine creativity to framing or wording.

rules.name: SCOPE_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for both general overview and specific detail.
rules.reason: General and specific scopes imply different output shapes. The agent should choose a primary scope and optionally include a focused example.

rules.name: LANGUAGE_TENSION
rules.description: Request asks for both technical language and accessible language.
rules.reason: Technical precision and accessibility can conflict. The agent should use plain explanations with technical terms introduced only when useful.
